description: Marketplace & ad creative rules — image must convert, not just look good
rules: Image must immediately communicate value within 2 seconds of viewing
Product must be recognizable without zooming — even on mobile
Text should remain readable on mobile screens — test at 200px wide
Price blocks should be visually dominant when included
CTA must naturally attract attention without overwhelming composition
Image should look trustworthy, commercial, and conversion-focused — not artistic
Every design should resemble a professionally designed Meta Ads or marketplace creative created by an experienced e-commerce marketing team
If text is present, it must answer: what is it + why should I care
Image works standalone — no context needed
Looks native on: Amazon, Trendyol, AliExpress, Wildberries, Meta Ads, TikTok Shop
